title: Implement generic personal assistant plugin runtime
summary: Implement the generic plugin runtime described by T1. Use one canonical state model integrated with existing MCP, Local Controller and Execution Job layers. Include versioned manifests, registry/discovery, lifecycle/health, typed action schemas, permission scopes, risk/confirmation policies, idempotency, cancellation/timeouts, structured results and audit events. Add focused unit/integration tests, update docs, run checks, and commit.
goals: Implement the generic plugin runtime described by T1. Use one canonical state model integrated with existing MCP, Local Controller and Execution Job layers. Include versioned manifests, registry/discovery, lifecycle/health, typed action schemas, permission scopes, risk/confirmation policies, idempotency, cancellation/timeouts, structured results and audit events. Add focused unit/integration tests, update docs, run checks, and commit.
nonGoals: Do not make unrelated changes outside the declared Task scope.
acceptanceCriteria: Plugin lifecycle and capability discovery work.
